description_long: This object is a detailed camping setup featuring a blue sleeping bag with a red plaid interior, two large blue backpacks, and a rolled-up sleeping mat. The arrangement includes a campfire ring made of gray stones, a rifle with a wooden stock, two lanterns, a cooking pot, a mug, and various camping tools such as an axe, knife, and flashlight. The sleeping bag is laid out flat, while the backpacks and rolled mat are positioned upright, suggesting readiness for use. The campfire ring is constructed from irregularly shaped stones, and the lanterns have visible handles and glass enclosures. The overall scene is reminiscent of a well-prepared campsite, with all essential gear for an outdoor overnight stay.
description: A comprehensive camping setup with a blue sleeping bag, backpacks, rolled mat, campfire ring, rifle, lanterns, and assorted camping tools, arranged as if for an outdoor overnight stay.
description_view_0: This view highlights the blue sleeping bag, two large backpacks, and the campfire ring, with the rifle and tools clearly visible in front.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full lineup of camping gear, with the sleeping bag, rolled mat, backpacks, lanterns, and tools all laid out in a row.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the thickness of the sleeping bag and the upright position of the backpacks, with the campfire ring and tools partially visible.
description_view_3: From the rear, the backs of the backpacks and the rolled mat are most prominent, with the sleeping bag and lanterns visible in the background.
attribute_entrance_type: zippered door on the sleeping bag, located along the side, with a visible flap; no tent entrance is present as this is a camping gear set.
attribute_guy_line_configuration: none visible; no guy lines present as this is not a pitched tent.
